response.global_analysis: 1. Lyrics Match: Reference lyrics were null, so manual transcription of the performance was performed. 2. Visual Events: Added visual subtitles for the prominent title cards and character name presentations during the silent introduction of the live performance. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitle transitions are precisely synchronized with the vocal delivery of the 3rd Generation members, avoiding cascading delays.

subtitles.original: I I I I I love you
I I I I I need you
subtitles.english: I, I, I, I, I need you

subtitles.english: More, more, more, more!

subtitles.original: 好きなだけ愛させて
subtitles.english: Let me love you as much as I want!

subtitles.original: 3期生ライブいくぺこー！
subtitles.english: 3rd Gen Live, here we go, peko!

subtitles.original: みんなで最高の思い出作ろうね！
subtitles.english: Let's make the best memories together!

subtitles.original: きゅるるんな毎日 君だらけ
subtitles.english: My sparkling days are full of you

subtitles.original: どうかしてるわ ねぇ、私
subtitles.english: There's something wrong with me, hey

subtitles.original: 心臓ドキドキになってるって？ ほうほう
subtitles.english: You say my heart is pounding? Oh really?

subtitles.english: Hallucinations appear every day

subtitles.original: 頭にお花咲いちゃって
subtitles.english: With flowers blooming in my head

subtitles.original: 恋ってやつは非常識ですわ
subtitles.english: This thing called love is absurd!

subtitles.original: いっそ食べちゃいたい
subtitles.english: I'd rather eat you up

subtitles.original: ちゅちゅちゅ萌えーション
subtitles.english: Chu, chu, chu, moe-ation

subtitles.english: Do-do-do sudden surge!

subtitles.original: これが恋ならもう後悔しないわ
subtitles.english: If this is love, I won't regret it anymore

subtitles.original: だから！
subtitles.english: So!

subtitles.original: 君のこと大好き大好き大好き大好き大好き
subtitles.english: I love you, love you, love you, love you, love you so much!

subtitles.original: 溢れるこの愛は
subtitles.english: This overflowing love

subtitles.original: きっとずっともっと止まらない
subtitles.english: Surely, forever, and even more, won't stop!

subtitles.english: Let me love you as much as I want!

subtitles.original: 揺れるハートがぴょんぴょんぴょん
subtitles.english: My swaying heart goes pyon, pyon, pyon!

subtitles.original: 沼に落ちてあわあわあわ
subtitles.english: Falling into the swamp, panicking!

subtitles.original: こんなになっても今更抜け出せない
subtitles.english: Even if I end up like this, I can't escape now!
